name: The Traveling
description: apaid AI agent discovery service for the ERC-8004 ecosystem. Query the on-chain agent registry using natural language to find agents by reputation, validations, capabilities, and more. Powered by x402 micropayments at $0.01 USDC per query on Base Ethereum. Supports semantic search, reputation filtering, validation filtering, and structural queries. No API keys required - just a wallet and a query. This The Travelling helps agents, enabling autonomous agent-to-agent discovery and collaboration in the trustless AI economy.
